summary.finance: South Korean stocks (Kospi) surged 8.4% on recovery hopes. Affinity Equity Partners is reshaping its Lotte Rental acquisition strategy.
summary.art: BAMA 2026 opens today at BEXCO with 136 galleries. Seo-Seoul Museum of Art hosts its inaugural 'SeMA Performance' program.

market_highlights: Kospi rebounded 8.4% on April 1, fueled by optimism over potential Iran war resolution.
Affinity Equity Partners seeks new acquisition route for Lotte Rental via SK Rent-a-Car.
art_highlights: BAMA 2026 opens today at BEXCO (until April 5) with 136 galleries.
Seo-Seoul Museum of Art presents 'SeMA Performance' through April 12.
